requirement_topic.en: IMANOR NM / IEC 62619 Lithium Battery Safety for BESS
requirement_topic.zh: IMANOR NM / IEC 62619 储能锂电池安全
requirement_topic.zht: IMANOR NM / IEC 62619 儲能鋰電池安全

summary.en: Morocco's IMANOR adopts IEC standards as NM national standards. IEC 62619:2022 (safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications) is the applicable standard for BESS battery cells and modules. IMANOR NM adoption of IEC 62619 means project owners, lenders, and insurers operating in Morocco expect test evidence against IEC 62619 or an equivalent recognised third-party test. Loi 24-09 (relative à la sécurité des produits et des services) establishes mandatory product safety obligations for electrical equipment placed on the Moroccan market. BESS battery modules and BMS components that fall within regulated electrical equipment categories must bear the CMIM mark (Cم) and are subject to Verification of Conformity (VoC) at origin — meaning a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an approved inspection body (such as SGS, Bureau Veritas, or similar) is required before shipment to Morocco.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥IMANOR将IEC标准采纳为NM国家标准。IEC 62619:2022（工业应用二次锂电芯与电池安全要求）是BESS电池芯和模组的适用标准。IMANOR NM采标IEC 62619意味着在摩洛哥运营的项目业主、贷款方和保险方期望提供IEC 62619或同等认可第三方测试的证据。Loi 24-09（关于产品和服务安全）为在摩洛哥市场投放的电气设备确立了强制性产品安全义务。属于受监管电气设备类别的BESS电池模组和BMS部件须贴附CMIM标志（Cم），并须在出货前进行原产地合格验证（VoC）——即须取得经认可检验机构（如SGS、Bureau Veritas等）颁发的符合性证书（CoC）。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥IMANOR將IEC標準採納為NM國家標準。IEC 62619:2022（工業應用二次鋰電芯與電池安全要求）是BESS電池芯和模組的適用標準。IMANOR NM採標IEC 62619意味著在摩洛哥運營的項目業主、貸款方和保險方期望提供IEC 62619或同等認可第三方測試的證據。Loi 24-09（關於產品和服務安全）為在摩洛哥市場投放的電氣設備確立了強制性產品安全義務。屬於受監管電氣設備類別的BESS電池模組和BMS部件須貼附CMIM標誌（Cم），並須在出貨前進行原產地合格驗證（VoC）——即須取得經認可檢驗機構（如SGS、Bureau Veritas等）頒發的符合性證書（CoC）。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 as adopted by IMANOR (NM framework)
Loi 24-09 relative à la sécurité des produits et des services (mandatory product safety for electrical equipment on the Moroccan market)
Moroccan VoC programme — Verification of Conformity at origin (Certificate of Conformity required before shipment for regulated categories)
CMIM mark (Cم) — Moroccan conformity mark for regulated electrical equipment
Moroccan ministerial arrêtés on regulated electrical equipment
IEC 62133 (portable sealed secondary cells — for smaller battery modules where scope applies)

summary.en: China BESS battery safety is governed by GB/T 36276-2023 (lithium-ion batteries for electrical energy storage — safety requirements) and GB 44240-2024 (general safety requirements for electrochemical energy storage systems). These standards align with IEC 62619 in many technical respects but are not directly accepted by IMANOR or Moroccan project owners; IEC 62619 test evidence from an accredited laboratory is needed.
summary.zh: 中国BESS电池安全以GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池安全要求）和GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统通用安全要求）为依据。这些标准在许多技术方面与IEC 62619对应，但不被IMANOR或摩洛哥项目业主直接接受；需要认可实验室出具的IEC 62619测试证据。
summary.zht: 中國BESS電池安全以GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池安全要求）和GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統通用安全要求）為依據。這些標準在許多技術方面與IEC 62619對應，但不被IMANOR或摩洛哥項目業主直接接受；需要認可實驗室出具的IEC 62619測試證據。

gap.en: Obtain IEC 62619:2022 test reports from an accredited laboratory for the battery cells and modules supplied in the BESS. Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 or GB 44240-2024 test data may support a gap analysis but does not replace IEC-route certification. Confirm with a Moroccan trade or customs consultant whether the specific BESS battery module and BMS product categories are listed under the Moroccan VoC programme; if so, engage an approved inspection body (e.g. SGS, Bureau Veritas) to conduct a pre-shipment Verification of Conformity and obtain a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) before export. Prepare a battery safety data sheet and cell-level traceability dossier for project-owner and insurer review.
gap.zh: 应委托认可实验室为BESS所供电池芯和模组出具IEC 62619:2022测试报告。中国GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024测试数据可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路径认证。应与摩洛哥贸易或海关顾问确认特定BESS电池模组和BMS产品类别是否列入摩洛哥VoC计划；如是，应在出口前委托经认可检验机构（如SGS、Bureau Veritas）进行出货前合格验证并取得符合性证书（CoC）。应准备电池安全数据表和电芯级可追溯文件包，供项目业主和保险方审查。
gap.zht: 應委託認可實驗室為BESS所供電池芯和模組出具IEC 62619:2022測試報告。中國GB/T 36276-2023或GB 44240-2024測試數據可支持差距分析，但不能替代IEC路徑認證。應與摩洛哥貿易或海關顧問確認特定BESS電池模組和BMS產品類別是否列入摩洛哥VoC計畫；如是，應在出口前委託經認可檢驗機構（如SGS、Bureau Veritas）進行出貨前合格驗證並取得符合性證書（CoC）。應準備電池安全數據表和電芯級可追溯文件包，供項目業主和保險方審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where a ministerial arrêté designates battery products; IEC 62619 compliance is the expected technical route; project-finance and insurer requirements may make it de facto mandatory
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory under GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 for Chinese BESS products; not directly transferable as IMANOR or IEC conformity

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36276-2023 and GB 44240-2024 battery safety evidence does not directly satisfy the IMANOR / IEC 62619 route expected for Morocco. Commission IEC 62619 testing from an accredited laboratory before shipment. If the product category is subject to the Moroccan VoC programme under Loi 24-09, a pre-shipment Certificate of Conformity (CoC) bearing the CMIM mark (Cم) is also required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024电池安全证据不能直接满足摩洛哥预期的IMANOR/IEC 62619路径。出货前应委托认可实验室完成IEC 62619测试。若产品类别依据Loi 24-09受摩洛哥VoC计划约束，还须取得贴附CMIM标志（Cم）的出货前符合性证书（CoC）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36276-2023和GB 44240-2024電池安全證據不能直接滿足摩洛哥預期的IMANOR/IEC 62619路徑。出貨前應委託認可實驗室完成IEC 62619測試。若產品類別依據Loi 24-09受摩洛哥VoC計畫約束，還須取得貼附CMIM標誌（Cم）的出貨前符合性證書（CoC）。

requirement_topic.en: IEC 62933 Energy Storage System Performance and Safety Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 62933 储能系统性能与安全要求
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 62933 儲能系統性能與安全要求

summary.en: IEC 62933 (electrical energy storage — EES systems) covers planning, installation, safety, and performance requirements for stationary energy storage systems. IEC 62933-2-1 covers unit parameters and testing methods; IEC 62933-5-1 and IEC 62933-5-2 cover safety requirements for grid-integrated systems. Moroccan project owners, lenders, and ONEE may expect system-level compliance with IEC 62933 for utility-scale or grid-connected BESS, particularly where international project financing applies.
summary.zh: IEC 62933（电力储能——EES系统）涵盖固定式储能系统的规划、安装、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵盖单元参数和测试方法；IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2涵盖电网集成系统的安全要求。摩洛哥项目业主、贷款方和ONEE对公用事业规模或并网BESS可能期望系统级IEC 62933合规，特别是涉及国际项目融资时。
summary.zht: IEC 62933（電力儲能——EES系統）涵蓋固定式儲能系統的規劃、安裝、安全和性能要求。IEC 62933-2-1涵蓋單元參數和測試方法；IEC 62933-5-1和IEC 62933-5-2涵蓋電網集成系統的安全要求。摩洛哥項目業主、貸款方和ONEE對公用事業規模或併網BESS可能期望系統級IEC 62933合規，特別是涉及國際項目融資時。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62933-2-1 (EES systems — unit parameters and testing methods)
IEC 62933-5-1 (EES systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated systems, general specification)
IEC 62933-5-2 (EES systems — safety requirements for grid-integrated systems, lithium-ion)

summary.en: China system-level BESS safety and performance references include GB/T 36558-2023 (general technical requirements for electrochemical energy storage stations connected to power systems) and GB/T 34131. These standards address similar system integration requirements but are not accepted as IEC 62933 compliance evidence for Moroccan project owners, lenders, or ONEE.
summary.zh: 中国系统级BESS安全和性能参考标准包括GB/T 36558-2023（接入电力系统的电化学储能电站通用技术要求）和GB/T 34131。这些标准涵盖类似的系统集成要求，但不被摩洛哥项目业主、贷款方或ONEE接受为IEC 62933合规证据。
summary.zht: 中國系統級BESS安全和性能參考標準包括GB/T 36558-2023（接入電力系統的電化學儲能電站通用技術要求）和GB/T 34131。這些標準涵蓋類似的系統集成要求，但不被摩洛哥項目業主、貸款方或ONEE接受為IEC 62933合規證據。

gap.en: Prepare system-level IEC 62933-2-1 performance data and IEC 62933-5-1 / 5-2 safety documentation for the BESS being offered to Moroccan projects. Engage with the project owner, independent engineer, or lender to confirm which specific IEC 62933 parts apply and whether third-party testing is required. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 data may be used in technical discussions but should be supplemented with IEC-route evidence.
gap.zh: 应为向摩洛哥项目提供的BESS准备系统级IEC 62933-2-1性能数据及IEC 62933-5-1/5-2安全文件。应与项目业主、独立工程师或贷款方沟通，确认适用的具体IEC 62933部分及是否要求第三方测试。中国GB/T 36558-2023数据可用于技术讨论，但应以IEC路径证据补充。
gap.zht: 應為向摩洛哥項目提供的BESS準備系統級IEC 62933-2-1性能數據及IEC 62933-5-1/5-2安全文件。應與項目業主、獨立工程師或貸款方溝通，確認適用的具體IEC 62933部分及是否要求第三方測試。中國GB/T 36558-2023數據可用於技術討論，但應以IEC路徑證據補充。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary at standard level but de facto mandatory for utility-scale projects with international project finance, IFC, or ONEE grid-connection review
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary reference standard; mandatory elements covered by GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36558-2023 for Chinese projects

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 36558-2023 system documentation is useful context but is not a substitute for IEC 62933 compliance evidence expected by Moroccan project owners, lenders, or ONEE for utility-scale BESS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 36558-2023系统文件具有参考价值，但不能替代摩洛哥项目业主、贷款方或ONEE对公用事业规模BESS所期望的IEC 62933合规证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 36558-2023系統文件具有參考價值，但不能替代摩洛哥項目業主、貸款方或ONEE對公用事業規模BESS所期望的IEC 62933合規證據。
